meaning_english: To show signs of cowardice.
To take the first step at great personal risk.

meaning_kannada: ಅತೀವ ಶ್ರಮ ಬೇಡುವ ಕೆಲಸ (Ativa shrama beduva kelasa)
meaning_english: A task requiring tremendous effort or strength.
To leave someone in a difficult situation without help.
To bribe someone.

word: To set the Thames on fire
meaning_english: To do something remarkable or exciting.
An unexpected winner or someone with hidden talents.

word: To build castles in the air
meaning_english: To create unrealistic plans or daydreams.
To make money improperly, often by using one's position.

meaning_kannada: ಅತಿ ಸರಳ ಮತ್ತು ಶಿಸ್ತಿನ ಜೀವನ (Serala mattu shistina jeevana)
meaning_english: A life of great self-discipline and simplicity.
To pay an excessive amount of money for something.
A sudden strike without trade union leadership.

word: To wash dirty linen in public
meaning_kannada: ಖಾಸಗಿ ವಿಷಯಗಳನ್ನು ಬಹಿರಂಗವಾಗಿ ಚರ್ಚಿಸುವುದು (Khasagi vishaya charchisuvudu)
meaning_english: To discuss private or embarrassing matters openly.

word: To be at one's beck and call
meaning_english: To be always ready to serve or obey someone.
A sudden and unexpected event, usually unpleasant.
To manipulate or falsify financial records.

meaning_kannada: ನಂಬಿಕೆ ದ್ರೋಹಿ ಅಥವಾ ಗುಪ್ತ ಶತ್ರು (Guptha shatru)
meaning_english: A hidden enemy or a treacherous person.

meaning_kannada: ಸಾಧ್ಯವಿರುವ ಎಲ್ಲ ಪ್ರಯತ್ನ ಮಾಡುವುದು (Ella prayatna maduvudu)
meaning_english: To make the greatest possible effort.
To stop something at an early stage.
An absurd and improbable story used as an excuse.
To keep a process or interest going.

meaning_kannada: ಸಣ್ಣ ವಿಷಯಕ್ಕೆ ದೊಡ್ಡ ಗಲಾಟೆ (Sanna vishayakke gallaate)
meaning_english: A lot of unnecessary anger over a small matter.

word: To put the cart before the horse
meaning_english: To do things in the wrong order.
To be in a state of inactivity or depression.

meaning_kannada: ಅತಿ ಸಣ್ಣ ವಿಷಯಗಳ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ವಾದಿಸುವುದು (Sanna vishayada vada)
meaning_english: To argue about very small and unimportant details.
A person with no substance or weak character.
To understand the hidden meaning.
To act in an irresponsible or unreliable way.
To accept unpleasant consequences.

meaning_kannada: ಕಷ್ಟದ ಸಮಯವನ್ನು ಯಶಸ್ವಿಯಾಗಿ ದಾಟುವುದು (Kashtada samaya datuvudu)
meaning_english: To survive a difficult situation.
